name: Neptune Technology Group Water Meter API (Roper Technologies)
what_it_does: Neptune Technology Group REST API for water meter reading systems and fixed network AMI for water utilities. Enables AI agents to manage automated meter reading (AMR) and fixed network AMI data collection for water utility billing, handle interval consumption data for tiered rate billing and conservation analytics, access leak detection and abnormal consumption alerting for non-revenue water management, retrieve meter health and diagnostic data for utility infrastructure management, manage endpoint commissioning and network configuration for AMI deployment, handle demand forecasting and consumption analytics for water utility planning, access customer usage data for conservation program and rebate management, retrieve billing export data for CIS integration, manage meter replacement and aging infrastructure data for capital planning, and integrate Neptune meter data with utility billing, customer information, and SCADA systems.
use_cases: Collecting water meter reads from AMR/AMI integration agents
Detecting leaks from non-revenue water management agents
Analyzing consumption from water conservation agents
Exporting billing data from water utility billing agents
not_for: Electric or gas utilities without water meter focus
Non-utility applications without water metering context
Utilities using competing AMI platforms (Itron, Sensus)
best_when: A water utility using Neptune AMR/AMI infrastructure wants AI agents to automate meter data collection, leak detection, billing integration, and consumption analytics.
avoid_when: INFRASTRUCTURE RISK: Neptune AMI network automation involves critical water infrastructure — automated commands to AMI network endpoints require safety validation. API access requires Neptune partner program enrollment; not publicly available. Neptune was owned by Roper Technologies and is a niche water-only AMI vendor; product investment may be limited compared to multi-utility vendors.

auth.notes: Neptune uses API key authentication. No OAuth 2.0. API access via Neptune partner program. No public webhooks. REST API with JSON. Tallassee, Alabama HQ. Neptune Technology Group is a water meter and AMI company. Strong in US municipal water utilities. Neptune R900 and E-CODER are flagship AMR/AMI products. Competes with Sensus, Itron, and Badger Meter for water utility AMR/AMI.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-endpoint and annual subscription
pricing.notes: Tallassee, Alabama. Neptune Technology Group. US municipal water utility focus. Neptune R900 AMR and Neptune fixed network AMI. Competes with Sensus (Xylem), Itron, and Badger Meter for water AMR/AMI market.

known_agent_gotchas: INFRASTRUCTURE RISK: Neptune AMI is critical water infrastructure; automated network commands require safety validation and rollback capability
Partner-only access — Neptune API requires partner program enrollment; no self-service developer access
No webhooks — meter data event notification requires polling; no event push capability
Limited public documentation — Neptune API documentation not publicly available; integration requires Neptune professional services
Water-only niche — Neptune is water-meter-only vendor; no electric or gas meter support; utility transitioning to multi-utility AMI must use different vendor
API key only — no OAuth; credential rotation requires manual key management with no automated rotation support
agent_readiness.security_notes: Water meter AMI. API key. US. Water utility meter data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Water AMI. API key. US. Critical water meter data.
